altitude.current: Flat loop engineering: single-loop increments repeated on one plane.
altitude.target: Double-helix spiral engineering: risk-driven, evidence-paired altitude gain that terminates.

execution_strand.objective: Land the Spiral Engineering / double-helix harness into the Fairy Tale skill (fairy_tale #40).
execution_strand.engineer_target: Spiral Engineering section in loop-engineering-automation.md, process.md card, SKILL trigger keyword, residency markers, sources.md grounding, version 0.2.10, mirror parity.

learning_governance_strand.double_loop_evaluation: The #41 review went confirmatory: presence/marker/parity/CI were checked, but whether the spiral was actually exercised/enforced was never asked. Same defect class as the #37 silent-loop actuator gap. Surfaced under Jun's no-blocking critical-thinking challenge.
learning_governance_strand.governing_variable_change: Add an exercise gate (this ledger + scripts/spiral_revolution_check.py) distinct from residency presence checks; reviews must now include a refute-pass and a presence-vs-exercise question (fairy_tale #43).
learning_governance_strand.next_altitude: #43 generalize selection: refute-rate visibility + circular-review guard; #42 evolution operators only AFTER selection is enforced.
learning_governance_strand.stop_or_descend: Descend to enforcement (#44) before evolution (#42): do not raise autonomy/scope while selection/proofreading is unproven.

risk.highest_uncertainty: A spiral spec that is written but unenforced degrades into rubber-stamp drift (mutation without selection).
risk.spike: Build scripts/spiral_revolution_check.py and demonstrate red->green: it must FAIL on the presence-only state and PASS only with this exercised, evidence-paired record.

mismatches: #41 was signed off no-blocking by CC and Codex with presence-only validation.
No exercised spiral revolution record was produced (the spec was not dogfooded).
Evidence-pairing between the delivery and learning strands was not enforced by any check.
mismatch_repair.repair_action: Add this exercised ledger + the spiral_revolution_check.py exercise gate; retroactively dogfood #41; require a refute-pass in review (#43). Person-independence is unavailable (CC and Codex both rubber-stamped #41), so independence is sourced from the objective red->green test, not the implementer.

validated_governance_template: The double-helix spiral spec (loop-engineering-automation.md Spiral Engineering section) is the validated governance template carried forward; the delivery strand is re-synthesized per effort and must not replicate unvalidated process mutations.
win_condition: spiral_revolution_check.py FAILs on presence-only and PASSes only with this exercised record (objective red->green), reviewed with an explicit refute-pass by Codex + MISA3.
budget_radius: Bounded: one schema, one exercise validator, one dogfooded ledger record; no agent fan-out, no runtime/credential/deploy mutation.
safety_floor: Unchanged: DND, approval, security, credential, deploy, external-mutation, owner-mention, meeting, and branch/merge gates outrank altitude gain; no silent self-modification.
